title: Rich and Creamy American Cottage Cheese Salad
description: This rich and creamy salad features cottage cheese blended with a tangy dressing, providing an energizing breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: 1 cup full-fat American-style cottage cheese
ingredients.notes: Use a higher fat content for creaminess.

ingredients.name: 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper
ingredients.notes: Freshly ground for the best flavor.

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons chopped fresh parsley, flat-leaf (optional)
ingredients.notes: Adds a pop of color and freshness.

instructions: In a small bowl, combine cottage cheese, lemon juice, black pepper, and garlic powder. Mix well until the mixture is smooth.
Garnish with chopped parsley if desired, taste test and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.
